{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heart’s Gem
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Heart]]’s Gem is considered the world's premier natural treasure for blood [[aura]], comparable to how [[Heaven’s Torch]] represents the peak of fire aura or [[Titan’s Bone]] represents earth. This shimmering, palm-sized brick is composed of petrified blood that has been condensed from the blood of the [[Redmoon Herald]], a former [[Blood Shadow]] to the [[Blood Sage]]. Visually, it appears as a scarlet or [[ruby]]-colored chunk of congealed blood that can pulse and exude thick clouds of blood [[aura]]. While it is a potent source of power, its radiance can diminish over time if the energy it emanates is not replenished. The gem has been used to provide blood [[aura]] for training, such as when [[Ruby]] absorbed its energy to develop a copy of a Steelborn [[Iron body]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Heart’s Gem]] is the ultimate source of blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Heart]]'s Gem is condensed from the blood of the [[Redmoon Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Heart’s Gem]] is from the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Heart’s Gem]] is a scarlet chunk of petrified blood in a scripted glass tank.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Heart’s Gem]] is a [[ruby]] of congealed blood.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“This is a Heart’s Gem,” the Blood Sage said, “the ultimate source of blood aura.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
